---
title: "A spatial microsimulation approach for the analysis of commuter patterns: From individual to regional levels"
description: "Robin Lovelace, Dimitris Ballas, and Matt Watson (2013). A spatial microsimulation approach for the analysis of commuter patterns: From individual to regional levels. *Journal of Transport Geography*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jtrangeo.2013.07.008"
date: "2013-08-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_spatial_2013"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Journal of Transport Geography"
doi: "10.1016/j.jtrangeo.2013.07.008"
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Dimitris Ballas"
  - "Matt Watson"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Journal of Transport Geography
**Year:** 2013

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jtrangeo.2013.07.008) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace, Dimitris Ballas, and Matt Watson (2013). A spatial microsimulation approach for the analysis of commuter patterns: From individual to regional levels. *Journal of Transport Geography*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jtrangeo.2013.07.008

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_spatial_2013,
  ids = {lovelace_spatial_2014},
  title = {A Spatial Microsimulation Approach for the Analysis of Commuter Patterns: From Individual to Regional Levels},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin and Ballas, Dimitris and Watson, Matt},
  year = {2013},
  month = aug,
  journal = {Journal of Transport Geography},
  volume = {34},
  publisher = {{Elsevier}},
  issn = {09666923},
  doi = {10.1016/j.jtrangeo.2013.07.008},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
  keywords = {Commuting,Policy evaluation,Spatial microsimulation},
  file = {/home/robin/Zotero/storage/47F7WWV5/Lovelace et al. - 2014 - A spatial microsimulation approach for the analysi.pdf;/home/robin/Zotero/storage/9IM82VC6/Lovelace et al. - 2013 - A spatial microsimulation approach for the analysi.pdf;/home/robin/Zotero/storage/2U5995WL/S0966692313001361.html;/home/robin/Zotero/storage/LHE7TBZG/S0966692313001361.html}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
